steps.title: Find the dominant theme
steps.content: The passage is dominated by Max's persistent desire to visit La Reina. He “begged Papa to take him,” dreams of becoming a hero, and repeatedly hopes Papa will finally agree—every detail revolves around his longing.

steps.title: Match the purpose to the correct answer
steps.content: Choice A directly answers the purpose by identifying Max's desire for La Reina. B misidentifies Papa's role, D introduces a theme about resistance to adulthood that the passage never mentions, and C contradicts the hopeful tone by suggesting criticism. That matches choice A — A is correct.
